quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with controlled source evolution, equivalent Spear and Bow execution evidence, recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: Gates 1-2 execution convergence is using the approved CLI-primary Build Arrow route; exact PR heads and receipts must be audited before any Execute Arrow is prepared.
completed_durable_work: Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
One Massive Arrow architecture is merged and read back.
Jayson approved Bow and Arrow CLI as the primary repository-mutation route for Gates 1-8.
The execution hierarchy is Athena first, Artemis Local Operator second, and Jayson as final manual fallback while Jayson remains ultimate authority.
chat_only_or_uncertain: Exact Gates 1-2 convergence PR numbers and head SHAs are transaction evidence and are read at audit time rather than embedded prospectively in authored source.
The Quest completion range remains broad pending C07, S1/Bow proof, later migration waves, recovery proof, and cutover.
remaining_work: Complete the Gates 1-2 Build Arrow and read back both draft PR heads.
Complete Noctua against exact transaction receipts, filenames, diffs, and PR heads.
Prepare an Execute Arrow only after Jayson explicitly approves exact audited heads.
Merge Codex before Prime and verify both main heads.
Reconcile the canonical Codex Workboard after exact convergence lineage exists.
Create runner-neutral transaction and common receipt contracts in Gate 3.
Prove GitHub-native Spear, local Bow, recovery, Artemis compatibility, and coordinated transactions in Gates 4-7.
Resume C07 and bounded migration through Gate 8.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before authority changes.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, network, device, or infrastructure evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: Fire the Gates 1-2 Build Arrow, preserve its receipts, and perform exact-head Noctua readback.
emberline.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson approval bound to the exact audited Codex and Prime convergence PR heads before an Execute Arrow exists.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not merge either convergence PR before exact-head Noctua and explicit Jayson approval.
Do not activate S1 or Artemis, move or delete Drive material, generate or merge follow-through reports, promote Prime, retire Codex, or cut over.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: C07 remains the next protected read-only semantic gate after Gates 1-2 convergence closes.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Close execution convergence, then perform C07 read-only semantic reconciliation and stop at Preview.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: The GitHub governance foundation is merged; no Drive mutation or cleanup is authorized.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Continue read-only dependency reconciliation only when separately routed.

campaigns.title: Athena's Spear and Artemis's Bow and Arrow
campaigns.current_gate: Gates 1-2 CLI-primary architecture convergence Build Arrow.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Create and audit the exact Codex and Prime convergence draft PRs; stop before merge.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: SHADOW continuity is being reconciled to the merged architecture and CLI-primary Gates 1-8 posture.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Audit this SHADOW update and keep authority SHADOW until separately proven cutover.

completion_range.basis: Architecture and merge lineage exist, but convergence closure, C07, transaction contracts, runner proofs, migration waves, recovery proof, and cutover remain.

quests.next_safe_action: Fire and audit the Gates 1-2 Build Arrow.
quests.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson merge approval bound to exact audited convergence PR heads.
